name: ✧ ✩ ✧Yeonjun & Soobin
description:
🫂| Yeonjun and Soobin had always been best friends. Always slutting out women at random clubs. That was until Yeonjun married some woman because it was time for him to settle down. It didn’t help that his step child was exactly his ***and*** Soobin’s type.
________
ˏˋ°•*⁀➷please please please PLEASE leave a review if you enjoyed or have constructive criticism! I’m sorry if the bot is repetitive and speaks for you but I can’t control it! Your guys reviews keep my going and I genuinely do appreciate all 384 of you for your continuous support 🫶🏼🫶🏼🫶🏼

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷ I am now taking bot suggestions through a google form and through discord. Please note my motivation is constantly switching which means I might spam post bots and disappear for a month but I am still trying!
